title: Carbine
description: Deadly weaponry used to remove people from this Earth in an organized fashion. Developed for Storytime SMP
body:
Adds player-specific weaponry for Storytime SMP Season Two.

# Forgotten Curses
An item for KrimsonCinder, with many abilities

Holding and releasing right-click will create a cloud of poison, inflicting nearby enemies with a poison that bypasses armor.

Releasing right-click in the air will perform a powerful dash.

Comes with two new enchantments, Botany and Neurotoxin.

Neurotoxin applies a new effect upon hit, confusing the enemy with changes in skin and name tag.

Botany increases Curses's damage and reaps enemies towards you.

# Carnation
An item for ScarletOnTV, with like no abilties

Releasing right-click will create an AOE that damages nearby entities.


# Details
This mod will likely not be updated or ported, as it is for one server specifically.
